Armando Frisanco was born in Mapleroot Edge before moving to Chicory Mews, where he now lives. He graduated from the Wavecrest School of Design, gaining valuable expertise in design principles. At present, he works at Solstice Circuitry, specializing in Cree vocabulary. His role involves integrating this linguistic knowledge into innovative projects that resonate with users.
